title: Homebuds Bathroom Scales for Body Weight, High Precision Assured by Weighing Scales Professional Factory SINCE 2001, Blue Backlit LCD and Step-On, 2*AAA Batteries Included, 400lb/28st, Clear Glass
features: AMAZING ACCURACY CHOICE - Our-owned professional factory has been focusing on high quality scales SINCE 2001, we make the scales for body weight with best-in-class technology and expertise, and proudly guarantee capacity 400lb/182kg/28st in high 0.1lb/0.05kg accuracy throughout the weighing scales lifecycle.

EASY TO USE - The weight scale utilized up-to-date digital technology, along with many friendly features, including: auto calibration, auto step-on, auto shut off, comfortably large size platform in 10.9 x 10.9'', 2*AAA batteries included, 3 units switch: lb/kg/st, and strong structure up to durable 20000 life time accuracy.

EASILY VISIBLE LCD - The bathroom scales are equipped with Bright Blue Backlit LCD in large number size, specially designed for clearly viewing numbers in any conditions, and kept the same brightness throughout batteries’ lifecycle.

ORIGINAL DESIGN - The weighing scales body weight are our original design with the idea:Healthy and Slim. Our whole team sincerely wishes everybody not only in good health, but also in good body shape.

BEYOND OUR WEIGHT SCALES - Based on over 20 years focusing on scales, our professional digital scales factory has been certified by ISO and Social Accountability for quality and social responsibility. All Homebuds scales for body weight proudly developed and produced by ourselves. Homebuds: Inspired by Life, for Better Life.
